name: Field report
about: Tried Plumbline on real work? Tell us what happened — good or bad.
title: "[Field report] "

---

<!--
Thanks for trying it. This is the most valuable thing you can send.
Be candid — negative reports are as useful as positive ones. Don't soften.
-->

## Context

- **What were you building?**
- **Stack / tools / which AI in the loop:**
- **Task size:** (one-off fix · feature · larger piece of work)

## What you used

Which checks did you run?

- [ ] Brief Linting
- [ ] Assumption Surfacing
- [ ] Omission Catalog
- [ ] The living artifacts (parking lot / decisions / logbook / catalog)
- [ ] Other / adapted (describe below)

## What happened

- **What surfaced that you'd otherwise have missed?**
- **What felt like pure overhead?**
- **What did you change, skip, or do differently by instinct?**

## Verdict

- **Would you reach for it again?** (yes · no · for some tasks)
- **Anything that read as tied to a specific stack** (it shouldn't be):
- **One thing you'd change about the method:**
